title: Add history names support
body:
The new `buildah images --history` flags shows the history of the names
an image had in the past. If the latest image in the history is equal
the current image's name, then we skip that on from the history for
convenient purposes.

comments.body: Tried it out and it looks good.

> Missing:
> Command completions

Alright, I added the bash completion. Now I'm just wondering why the bud integration test fails :thinking:
This looks like a bug caused by a different patch to containers/storage.
Changes LGTM, @vrothberg anythoughts on the c/storage error in the test?
This seems to be the cause of the issue: https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/466
@saschagrunert does the latest container/storage fix this issue, or do we need to cut another release?
I think so, let's see what the CI think about it. :)
Looks like that xattrs patch is still problematic?
Yes, I wrote a comment at the linked closed PR for containers storage. I’m not sure if we should revert the change honestly. I’ll debug further tomorrow.
Added a commit to vendor the fix of https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/483, but I expect that it will break stuff again...
This looks good, lets get the other PRs merged into container/storage and then I can cut another release.
LGTM.  @rhatdan I'll let you pull the trigger on the merge of this one.
Let's wait for https://github.com/containers/storage/pull/485, which I can vendor in here.
Vendored containers/storage v1.15.2, ready for review.
